description: Apple Mail and Calendar integration — iCloud + Outlook accounts

capabilities.list_unread: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get subject of (messages of inbox whose read status is false)'
capabilities.count_unread: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to count (messages of inbox whose read status is false)'
capabilities.read_message: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get {subject, sender, content} of message {ID} of inbox'
capabilities.list_accounts: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get name of every account'
capabilities.list_mailboxes: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get name of every mailbox of account "ACCOUNT"'
capabilities.search: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get subject of (messages of inbox whose subject contains "QUERY")'
capabilities.send: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to make new outgoing message with properties {subject:"SUBJECT", content:"BODY", visible:true}'
capabilities.flag_message: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to set flagged status of message {ID} of inbox to true'

enhanced_cli.install_notes: JXA-based CLI — outputs JSON, supports accounts/mailboxes/messages/attachments

capabilities.list_calendars: osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar" to get name of every calendar'
capabilities.today_events: osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar" to get summary of (every event of every calendar whose start date >= (current date) and start date < ((current date) + 1 * days))'
capabilities.create_event: osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar" to tell calendar "CALENDAR" to make new event with properties {summary:"TITLE", start date:date "DATE", end date:date "DATE"}'
capabilities.upcoming_events: osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar" to get {summary, start date} of (every event of every calendar whose start date >= (current date) and start date < ((current date) + 7 * days))'

enhanced_cli.install_notes: macOS app (DMG download) — MCP bridge for Apple ecosystem, supports natural language

google_calendar.notes: OAuth2 Desktop flow — needs initial auth handshake to get refresh token

gmail.notes: VIP alert pipeline — triage inbox, flag important, daily digest

morning_briefing.description: Daily morning briefing — unread email summary + today's calendar
steps: Fetch unread count from iCloud + Outlook via Apple Mail
Fetch today's events from Apple Calendar (both accounts)

email_triage.description: Triage inbox — VIP detection, urgency scoring, action items
steps: Fetch unread emails from Apple Mail
Extract action items via extract_ideas pattern

meeting_prep.description: Pre-meeting context — attendees, agenda, related docs
steps: Search Susan RAG for related context per attendee/company
